creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->pav

> 1) Remove - from PORTNAME via PKGNAMEPREFIX 

What is the benefit of this change? IMHO it makes the Makefile less intuitive. 

> 4) Implement and use DOCSDIR in pkg-list 

What is the benefit of this change? User can't override DOCSDIR anyway. 

> 5) Renamed patch files via makepatch to not use ':' in names (no modifications) 

What is the benefit of this change? It means unnecesary repochurn.
